name: Qualified Reservist Distributions

eligibility.description: Reservists ordered to active duty for a period in excess of 179 days or an indefinite period.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows members of the reserves called to active duty to receive a distribution of unused health FSA balances, avoiding the 'use-it-or-lose-it' rule.
